heading: Completion of material protection, control, and accounting activities in the Russian Federation
label: 6152 Completion of material protection, control, and accounting activities in the Russian Federation
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6152 was renumbered .section 8263 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , which was set out as a note under , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 3122(b) of Pub. L. 113–291section 2565 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(14)

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b) or specifically authorized by Congress, international material protection, control, and accounting activities in the Russian Federation shall be completed not later than fiscal year 2018.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: The limitation in subsection (a) shall not apply to international material protection, control, and accounting activities in the Russian Federation associated with the Agreement Concerning the Management and Disposition of Plutonium Designated as No Longer Required for Defense Purposes and Related Cooperation, signed at Moscow and Washington August 29 and , and entered into force (TIAS 11–713.1), between the United States and the Russian Federation.September 1, 2000July 13, 2011
